name: Logz.io
description: Monitor Logz.io log management and SIEM for observability and security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Logz.io
2. Go to Settings > Manage tokens > API tokens
3. Create or copy an existing API token
4. Select your region based on your Logz.io URL

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Logz.io Settings > Manage tokens > API tokens

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your Logz.io API region. Found in your Logz.io URL (e.g., app.logz.io = US East).

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Logz.io alerts are configured for log-based monitoring

checks.name: Utility Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies Logz.io is actively receiving log data
